MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Defendant Andrew Oday's Motion to Extend Jurisdiction of Arbitrator for 180 days is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 12/27/2004.
